Other table

Name Type Description
DummyTestShould not appear in output

Base game

Achievement Requirements Hints Ver DI
Archaeologist
Successfully investigate an archaeological site.
 Complete all levels of an archaeological site The Galactic Doorstep origin will create an archaeological site in the starting system within the first years of the game. 2.3 VE
Brave New World
Colonize a planet.
 Number of owned planets > 1 Starting the game with the Guaranteed Habitable Worlds setting to 1 or 2 creates very suitable planets nearby. 1.0 VE
Break On Through...
Research a Rare technology.
 Number of acquired rare techs > 0 The Void Dwellers and Teachers of the Shroud origins start with a rare technology as a permanent research option. 1.0 VE

Leviathans

Achievement Requirements Hints Ver DI
Dreadnought
Obtain an Automated Dreadnought.
 Capture or repair the Automated Dreadnought and have it in your fleet. The Automated Dreadnought can be found in a special system. Repairing it requires Engineering research. 1.2 E
Infinite Creation
Have an Infinity Machine reach a useful state.
 Complete the Infinity Machine event chain and have it provide a benefit. The Infinity Machine is a leviathan found in a special system. Outcomes vary based on choices. 1.2 M

Nomads

Achievement Requirements Hints Ver DI
Khan of Khans
Seize back your throne and have at least 5 Satrapy Vassals.
 As Heirs of the Khan, reclaim the throne and have at least 5 Satrapy vassals. Start as Heirs of the Khan; focus on subjugating other empires as Satrapies to reach 5. 4.4 UC
Forever is a Long Time
Survive for at least 200 years and reach the End Game Crisis.
 As Forever Cruise, survive 200+ years and the End Game Crisis must begin. The Forever Cruise origin has mechanics to manage passenger satisfaction across long playtimes. 4.4 UC
